segments.name: 50+ Adults
segments.description: Adults 50-75 who always wanted to learn piano and finally have the time
approved_hooks: Have time? Make it meaningful — learn a real-life skill.
Going back to piano? This is how it's done in 2026.
You're in the perfect position to start: you have the time, you have the brain, and we have the app.
At your own pace, no stress — do it for fun.
This is your time to fulfill a lifetime dream — playing the piano.

segments.name: Parents & Kids
segments.description: Parents looking for structured, fun music education for their children
donts: make it look like just another screen
approved_hooks: Give them a skill that lasts a lifetime.
Watch them go from zero to playing real songs — in weeks.
The piano lesson that fits around your schedule.

segments.name: General Adult Beginners
segments.description: Adults 25-45 who want to learn piano as a hobby or personal goal
approved_hooks: Play the songs you actually love — not scales.
Learn piano in weeks, not years.
Not a game. Not a toy. The real thing.

simply_piano_known_angles: Works with any piano or keyboard
